basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for Guest Faculty Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the DTU office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Guest Faculty: Eligible candidates as per the reference DTU/Maths/9630, dated 5th May 2026

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the DTU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Delhi Technological University (DTU) recruitment is Guest Faculty. This is a contract-based position for the academic year 2026-27.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Guest Faculty post at Delhi Technological University (DTU) as per the advertisement DTU/Maths/9727.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty position at DTU is scheduled for 05 June 2026. Candidates should report at least 15 minutes before the scheduled time.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification mentioned is graduate. However, specific eligibility criteria are as per reference DTU/Maths/9630, dated 5th May 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original certificates/marksheets, two sets of self-attested photocopies of all relevant documents, two sets of the latest resume/CV, two passport-size photographs, and a valid photo identity proof.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification released by Delhi Technological University for the Guest Faculty position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty post at DTU will be based on an Interaction/Interview. Candidates will be assessed during this stage.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Delhi Technological University (DTU), Delhi - 110042. Candidates should report to the DTU office.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Guest Faculty position at Delhi Technological University (DTU) is Contractual, for the academic year 2026-27.
